generated_oml:
import "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab" as DTDFVocab
import "http://www.example.org/base" as base
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder sensor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTStream
]
instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder sensor behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTStream
]
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTStream
]
instance MQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series data stream from sensors (motor encoder, secondary encoder, current) via MQTT protocol",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]
instance MABIMAX100System : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 robot system",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment FirstAxis
]
instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from friction model identification for control parameter updates"
]
instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control parameter updates based on friction model identification to enhance motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance FrictionDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization insight for human operators to understand physical relationships"
]
instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with steps: problem identification (friction understanding), asset/model analysis, model creation (simulation models), data identification continuous refinement of friction models during operation using live data"
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight
]
instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model correction",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction data",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualizationInsight
]
instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology for digital twin evolution",
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]
instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]
instance MQTTStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance SinumerikControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for friction data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance InputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from motor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]
instance Position : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder and secondary encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]
instance Torque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data (τ) measured in first axis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]
instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data (ω) from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]
instance SimulatedMotorOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (r_M) from friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SinumerikControllerEnabler
]
instance SimulatedGearOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gear output (r_G) from friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SinumerikControllerEnabler
]
instance SimulatedOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated overall output (r_out) from friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SinumerikControllerEnabler
]
instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]
instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating physical robot axis components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, AAS metadata, Simulink simulation models, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard for integrated visualization"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time data during robot operation for wear, tool, and application changes)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed by deviation between simulated data (from white- and black-box models) and measured data; validation through torque and angular velocity comparison"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming between physical sensors and digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [

]
